parameters.content:
ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES (configure in n8n Settings > Variables):

CAP_BASE_URL          — CAP backend base URL
S4HANA_BASE_URL       — OGS S/4HANA base URL via BTP Destination (OGS_S4)
XSUAA_TOKEN_URL       — XSUAA token endpoint URL
XSUAA_CLIENT_ID       — XSUAA client ID
XSUAA_CLIENT_SECRET   — XSUAA client secret
BTP_ANS_URL           — BTP Alert Notification Service endpoint
BTP_ANS_TOKEN         — BTP ANS bearer token
TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL     — MS Teams Incoming Webhook URL
REPORT_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS — Comma-separated email list
PDF_SERVICE_URL       — PDF generation service URL

NO credentials blocks are embedded in this workflow.

nodes.name: 2. ATG Ingest → IS-OIL Tank Dip Ingest

parameters.jsonBody: ={"eventType":"TankReconciliationIngestFailed","severity":"FATAL","subject":"Tank Reconciliation HALTED - Missing Data {{ $('5. Merge and Validate Data').first().json.runDate }}","body":"Reconciliation run HALTED. Missing tank data: {{ $('5. Merge and Validate Data').first().json.missingTankIds.join(', ') }}"}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('13-14. Variance Engine').first().json;
return data.tanks.map(tank => ({ json: { runId: data.runId, run_ID: data.runId, tankId: tank.tankId, tankName: tank.tankId, material: tank.material, plant: tank.plant, storageLocation: tank.storageLocation, grossVolumeObserved: tank.grossVolume, temperature: tank.temperature, vcfFactor: tank.vcfFactor, vcfSource: tank.vcfSource, netVolumePhysical: tank.netVolumePhysical, bookStock: tank.bookStock, delta: tank.delta, deltaPercent: tank.deltaPercent, flagThresholdPct: tank.flagThresholdPct, urgentThresholdPct: tank.urgentThresholdPct, classification: tank.classification, postingStatus: tank.postingStatus } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={"eventType":"TankReconciliationUrgentVariance","severity":"FATAL","subject":"URGENT Tank Variance Requires Approval - {{ $json.runDate }}","body":"{{ $json.urgentCount }} tank(s) have URGENT variances requiring supervisor approval. Run: {{ $json.runId }}"}

={"eventType":"TankReconciliationComplete","severity":"{{ $json.urgentCount > 0 ? 'FATAL' : $json.flagCount > 0 ? 'WARNING' : 'INFO' }}","subject":"Tank Reconciliation {{ $json.runDate }} Complete","body":"Run complete: OK={{ $json.okCount }}, FLAG={{ $json.flagCount }}, URGENT={{ $json.urgentCount }}"}

={"@type":"MessageCard","@context":"http://schema.org/extensions","summary":"Tank Reconciliation {{ $json.runDate }}","themeColor":"{{ $json.urgentCount > 0 ? 'FF0000' : $json.flagCount > 0 ? 'FFA500' : '00AA00' }}","title":"Tank Reconciliation {{ $json.runDate }}","text":"OK={{ $json.okCount }}, FLAG={{ $json.flagCount }}, URGENT={{ $json.urgentCount }}. Total: {{ $json.tankCount }} tanks."}

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: =M6.achieved: reconciliation report distributed via email and Teams

parameters.jsonBody: ={"eventType":"TankReconciliationError","severity":"FATAL","subject":"Tank Reconciliation FAILED","body":"Workflow error: {{ $json.message || 'Unknown error' }} at node: {{ $json.node?.name || 'unknown' }}"}

main.node: 2. ATG Ingest → IS-OIL Tank Dip Ingest
